ddls:
CREATE TABLE "load_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the load test scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load test scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the load test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the load test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the load test was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the load test (e.g., scheduled, running, completed) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the load test */,
  "ramp_up_time" TEXT /* Time taken to reach the maximum number of concurrent users */,
  "max_parallel_clients" INTEGER /* Maximum number of parallel clients (concurrent users) to simulate */,
  "expected_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the load test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the load test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp to track user activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test being executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Date and time the test execution started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Date and time the test execution ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made during the test */,
  "successful_requests" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests */,
  "failed_requests" INTEGER /* Number of failed requests */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Actual duration of the test execution */,
  "concurrent_users" INTEGER /* Number of concurrent users during the execution */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional test data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test schedule */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test being scheduled */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the scheduled test execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the scheduled test execution */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the scheduled test execution (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "cron_expression" TEXT /* Cron expression for scheduling the test */,
  "next_run_time" TEXT /* Next scheduled run time of the test */,
  "last_run_time" TEXT /* Last run time of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "request_id" TEXT /* ID of the request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the request */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  "response_size" INTEGER /* Size of the response in bytes */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request */,
  "request_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store request data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., application, database) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., performance, error) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., performance, error, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_alerts_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made during the test */,
  "successful_requests" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests */,
  "failed_requests" INTEGER /* Number of failed requests */,
  "min_response_time" REAL /* Minimum response time */,
  "max_response_time" REAL /* Maximum response time */,
  "mean_response_time" REAL /* Mean response time */,
  "p95_response_time" REAL /* 95th percentile response time */,
  "p99_response_time" REAL /* 99th percentile response time */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the metrics were collected */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional summary data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_summary_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id")
)
